nodes.label: Pahath-moab
nodes.description: Governor of Moab, a person whose descendants returned from the Captivity and assisted in rebuilding Jerusalem (Ezra 2:6; 8:4; 10:30).

verses.text: The children of Pahathmoab, of the children of Jeshua and Joab, two thousand eight hundred and twelve.
The children of Pahathmoab, of the children of Jeshua and Joab, two thousand and eight hundred and eighteen.
